titleStmt.title: SII 9.189: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 189. (A.R. No. 74 of 1904.) ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP ON THE WEST SIDE OF A RUINED SHRINE CLOSE TO THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 37, Nandana, Chaitra, amāvāsye, Ādityavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa. If Chaitra-Amāvāsye is taken as Amāvāsye preceding Chaitra or if the month is considered to be Pūrṇimānta then the equivalent of the date might be A.D. 1113 March 19 Wednesday, when there was a solar eclipse. The week day is, however, wrong even in this case. The record refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva and mentions his feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva as ruling over Noḻambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand. The Mahāmaleyāḷa-Vaḍḍavyavahāri Ponmūrkhaseṭṭi is stated to have washed the feet of the Śaiva teacher Śivaśakti-Paṇḍita and granted, in the presence of the Mahājanas of Bāḷguḷi, gadyāṇas 14 for burning a perpetual lamp before the god Kalidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvalla
ja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ
ḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuva
jayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddha
drārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpa
tapaṁcamahāśabdaṁ mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpura
yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi
ḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍa paricchēdigaṇḍaṁ rājigacōḷamanō
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ nā
samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷē
raṁ tribhuvanamallapāṇḍyadēvarṇnoḷaṁbavāḍi
mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaviśiṣṭapratipā
ḷana(ṁ)mmāḍi sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . svasti yama
niyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhāṇajapa
samādhiguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmat hariścaṁdradattiyagra
hāraṁ bāḷguḷiyūroḍayapramukhamahāja
namayvadiṁbara sannidhānadoḷ cāḷukyavikramavarṣa 37
neya naṁdanasaṁvatsarada caitradamāvāśye Ādivāraṁ
sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu svasti samastavastuguṇagaṇā
ḷaṁkāracārucāritranayavinayaśīlācārasaṁpannarappa śrī
niḍuṁgālnāḍa śrīmanmahāmaleyāḷavaḍḍavyavahā
ri ponmūrkhkhaseṭṭiyarssamastaguṇasampannarappa śrī
matsivaśaktipaṇḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvaka(ṁ)mmā
ḍi śrīsvayaṁbhukalidēvasvāmidēvargge
raḍu naṁdādīvige naḍavaṁtāgi biṭṭa gadyāṇaṁ 14
Intī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavarge prayāgevāraṇā
sikurukṣētradoḷsāsirvvarvvēdapāragargge sāsira kapile
yanubhayamukhigoṭṭa phalamakkumidanaḷida
vargganitu kapileyumananitu brāhmaṇarumananaḷida ma
hāpātakamakku svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.189 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
